subcodes.first_line: O Physician! The True Physician saith: Strive ye, that perchance the ailments of heedlessness and ignorance may be banished from humankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طبیب طبیب حقیقی میفرماید جهد نمائید شاید امراض غفلت و نادانی را از نوع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @knowledge; recognition of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
